name: Per-Tenant Usage Monitoring
objective: Meter per-tenant/per-project usage (API calls, documents saved, search activity) and expose it via API for the dashboard; free plan only — observability, not quotas or billing

review.note: P11 Per-Tenant Usage Monitoring: offline gate green (65 passed, imports, py_compile, validate) and the live meter→read E2E executed and PASSED against a disposable postgres:17 tenant-mode stack (alembic 0001+0002 applied, seed, uvicorn, onboarding_smoke PASS). S1–S4 reviewed vs objective/intent/decisions — observability-only, event-log grain, meter writes+searches only, frozen /api/* contract untouched, cross-tenant usage 404, best-effort metering never fails a request; no defects. Six durable docs consolidated (data v0007, api v0008, backend v0006, operations v0012, decisions v0012, security v0007).
